zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Saward於1605年出生在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德時，她的父親Thomas Saward30歲，母親Winifred Nightingale25歲。她於1621年11月1日與Nicholas Lauson George在英國艾可萊特爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1669年9月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州蘭卡斯特享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Saward于1605年出生在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德时，她的父亲Thomas Saward30岁，母亲Winifred Nightingale25岁。她于1621年11月1日与Nicholas Lauson George在英国艾可萊特爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1669年9月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州蘭卡斯特享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Saward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seward
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Seward (Old English Sǣweard, from sǣ ‘sea’ + weard ‘guard’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Siward, Seward (Old English Sigeweard, from sige ‘victory’ + weard ‘guard’, or the equivalent Old Norse Sigwarth).
Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt, usually Anglicized as Sword .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Saward was born in 1605, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, her father, Thomas Saward, was 30 and her mother, Winifred Nightingale, was 25. She married Nicholas Lauson George on 1 November 1621, in Writtle, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 September 1669, in Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Saward est née en 1605, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Saward, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Winifred Nightingale, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Lauson George le 1 novembre 1621, à Writtle, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 septembre 1669, à Lancaster, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 64 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Saward è nata il nel 1605 nel Chelmsford, Essex, England, sua padre, Thomas Saward, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Winifred Nightingale, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Lauson George il 1 novembre 1621, nel Writtle, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1669, nel Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 64 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Saward(이)가 1605년 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Saward(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Winifred Nightingale(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1621년 11월 1일 영국 에세스 리틀에서 Nicholas Lauson George(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1669년 9월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 랭커스터에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Saward nasceu em 1605, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Saward, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Winifred Nightingale, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Lauson George em 1 de novembro de 1621, em Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1669, em Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Saward родилась в 1605 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Saward было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Winifred Nightingale, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Lauson George 1 ноября 1621 г. в местности риттл, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 сентября 1669 г. в местности ланкастир, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 64 лет.
